low.label: Growth years 1–5

low.rationale: Platform quality bounds; not the stance gate.

low.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 18× / 22× / 26× on year-7 cash path.

low.rationale: Preserves Phase-3 component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

economic_ownership_map.label: Experiences and services attach option

low.label: Risk-adjusted experiences and services attach economics
low.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on experiences/services GBV attach beyond core nights engine; seats remain embedded in Nights and Seats Booked KPI (10-K).

base.label: Risk-adjusted experiences and services attach economics
base.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on experiences/services GBV attach beyond core nights engine; seats remain embedded in Nights and Seats Booked KPI (10-K).

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Milestone value over 3–7 years as experiences/services mix expands.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Low case $0/sh; base $4/sh; high $12/sh on incremental attach beyond nights path.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Marketing and product spend for attach largely in core owner-cash path; option net of embedded spend.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Core marketplace owner-cash engine (nights and GBV)

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
